feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: EXIT_/SAPAPO/SAPLBOP_040 Business event is not getting flipped
entry.content:
Hi,

 I m trying to flip the Business event for a Order from 'A' to a another business event 'ZA' based on certain condition through /SAPAPO/BOP but business event is  not updated to /sapapo/atpparam table . So please  help out whether do i need to change any other field in the CT_REQ .

SCM APO Integration (CIF)  SCM APO Global ATP

entry.title: How to send a high priority mail as in outlook from ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send  a high priority mail from ABAP OData. I am currently using cl_bcs class. I have tried setting the priority in SODOCCHGI1 as 1. But still i am not able to receive mail with high importance flag.

entry.title: Entry of deleted function group still appears in SE80 and Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello,

I have deleted a function group but its name is still shown in Eclipse (it's the same in SE80):

If I delete it again, it says it's deleted. If I double click the name, it says it's deleted.

What can I do to remove it from the screen?

Sandra

System: ABAP 7.58 SP 1

entry.title: How to move data from TEVEN to RT table in Payroll?
entry.content:
hello Expert , I am abap developer

I'm working on Payroll schema, and I want to include time data from TEVEN table (e.g. attendance or absence hours) into the RT (Results Table).

I know TEVEN is processed in Time Evaluation (TM00), but is there a way to transfer certain TEVEN data (like total hours) into Payroll RT using schema logic or a custom operation?

entry.title: Is it possible to register the same project ID multiple times?
entry.content:
We would like to create multiple projects with the same project ID. Is this feasible?

Below are the business requirements:

My customer consists of two group companies: Company A and Company B.
Their respective roles are as follows:

  • Company A (parent company): Receives orders from clients and outsources manufacturing to its subsidiary, Company B.

  • Company B (subsidiary): Manufactures products based on requests from Company A.

In this setup, both Company A and Company B use the same project ID to maintain consistency across projects.

Since Company A and Company B are separate legal entities, they operate under different company codes and controlling areas.
Therefore, it is necessary to register separate projects within each entity.

Is there a way to fulfill the above requirements?
It would be ideal if we could define separate number ranges by company code or controlling area.

I would greatly appreciate expert guidance on this matter.

entry.title: What is parameter MASS_PROCESSING of IDoc Inbound Function Modules?
entry.content:
Out of curiosity, what is the parameter MASS_PROCESSING of IDoc Inbound Function Modules?

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Fiori ALP - Visual Filter does not work when many records
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I am having a problem with Fiori Analytical List Page (ALP).

I created a project to display some charts based on the data we have (Dumps), it starts working properly with a small amount of data, however when the data is more realistic it starts failing. For example: Less than 200 records. Everything is working fine!



More than 200 records: Visual Filters does not load any more and above 700 records approx the main chart does not load anymore.



I am learning about this technology, so I am not sure what the problem is

I was thinking in maybe limit these charts to the top N values

Visual Filter: Top 3-5 or Last 5 records.
Bar Chart: Top 20 records

But not sure if that will help me to solve it and also I don't know if is possible.

Thanks!

entry.title: BUDGET EXCEEDED - EMAIL CUSTOMIZATION
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

When the budget is exceeded, one email should be sent. this is the email and i want to change it using dynamic values. ( Please contact Oder &owner& (Name)).

 

Can any one guide me how to use se61 to update the email or any other road.

Thanks !

entry.title: Adding Hyper link in ALV
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I'm trying to add Hyperlink in my ALV display Through which I can Directly access a specific line no of a report.

Is it Possible or not If  please tell How??

entry.title: ABAP: Installation Guide
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Community,

Quite new to ABAP, however the whole installation process is a bit interesting.

Is there a quick guide to install everything a for it to be within the framework of it being a free trail ?

Some additional questions:

1. How to install SAP GUI

entry.title: Using ABAP RAP, show radio buttons in a popup
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a simple requirement to show a popup containing four radio buttons using ABAP RAP.

First Try
I tried to use abstract entity and was able to show the popup with Input & CheckBox but cannot find a suitable datatype that renders a Radio button.

If there exist a suitable data type that renders radio button, it would be one of the easiest solution.

SecondTry
I tried to use a custom CDS enumerated type in my abstract entity but discovered that it is not supported.
Yes, we do have other options of extending the Fiori element in BAS using UI5 or Flexible Programming model but I want to avoid that and find a solution within RAP itself.

entry.title: use counter in value for
entry.content:
Hey there!

I have the following code

    lt_items = VALUE #( FOR ls_input IN it_input (
      item_no     = 0
      material    = ls_input-matnr
      short_text  = ls_input-txz01 ) ).

How do I get an item counter to have ITEM_NO filled for each line of IT_INPUT?

Something like

    lt_items = VALUE #( FOR ls_input IN it_input 
                        LET pos = 1 IN pos = pos + 1 (
      item_no     = pos
      material    = ls_input-matnr
      short_text  = ls_input-txz01 ) ).

Thanks

entry.title: ABAP RAP: Upload data from Excel file
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I was wondering if it is possible to upload the data from an Excel file  without saving the rawstring data in the database?  without any modification on the front-end.

In most tutorial what I have seen, the attachment content is saved in a database tabel.

Thanks in advane

entry.title: Clean Core approach to migrate custom onpremise RFC ABAP Function Module
entry.content:
Hello! I have questions about ABAP, Clean Core and RFC. 

A company has an custom addon/software component that is installed on on-premise systems. ECC, S/4, SRM, CRM. These systems communicate each other via the addon. The addon communicates using RFC connections based on custom ABAP Function Modules.

Company wants to make the addon "clean core compliant". And some questions like these arised:

1 - is rfc connection between onpremise systems clean core compliant?

2 - if the previous answer is no, how to make rfc connections clean core without put everything inside cds custom entity and expose as odata service?

3 - make onpremise abap programs clean core means always expose data as odata service using rap?

entry.title: Retrieve the name of a restricted key figure in a customer exit variable?
entry.content:
Hello,

does anybody knows if it's possible, in a customer exit variable used to restrict values on an infoobject in a restricted key figure, to get the technical name of the restricted key figure?

The idea is to read from another table the value to restrict according to the name of the restricted key figure...

 

Restricted key figure nameCompany Code
RESTRICTED_KEY_FIGURE_14711
RESTRICTED_KEY_FIGURE_24712

If this is possible I could always use the same variable in different restricted key figure...

RESTRICTED_KEY_FIGURE_1 should read in the tbale the filter on company code = 4711

RESTRICTED_KEY_FIGURE_2 should read in the tbale the filter on company code = 4712

Thanks!

BR,

Gilles

entry.title: Wrong behaviour of cl_gui_alv_grid or wrong usage?
entry.content:
Hey folks!

I have the following issue when using an F4-value help in cl_gui_alv_grid:

I use a custom F4-value using event onf4.

The input of this field is checked by event data_changed.

When I enter the value manually, the check will be done and documented by add_protocol_entry.

When I select the value by F4-value help, then the check will also be done, but the protocol does not appear.

please see the following sample code.

I will be happy for any feedback.

REPORT.

PARAMETERS test.

CLASS appl DEFINITION.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS start IMPORTING container TYPE REF TO cl_gui_container.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA grid TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_data,
             id TYPE c LENGTH 10,
           END OF ts_data,
           tt_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_data WITH DEFAULT KEY.
    DATA data TYPE tt_data.
    METHODS get_fcat RETURNING VALUE(result) TYPE lvc_t_fcat.
    METHODS on_data_changed FOR EVENT data_changed OF cl_gui_alv_grid IMPORTING e_onf4 e_onf4_after e_onf4_before e_ucomm er_data_changed.
    METHODS on_f4 FOR EVENT onf4 OF cl_gui_alv_grid IMPORTING e_display e_fieldname e_fieldvalue er_event_data es_row_no et_bad_cells.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS appl IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD start.

    grid = NEW #( i_parent = container ).
    DATA(lt_fcat) = get_fcat( ).
    data = VALUE #( ( ) ).
    grid->set_table_for_first_display(
      CHANGING
        it_outtab                     = data
        it_fieldcatalog               = lt_fcat
      EXCEPTIONS
        invalid_parameter_combination = 1                    " Wrong Parameter
        program_error                 = 2                    " Program Errors
        too_many_lines                = 3                    " Too many Rows in Ready for Input Grid
        OTHERS                        = 4  ).
    grid->register_edit_event( cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_evt_modified ).
    grid->set_ready_for_input( 1 ).
    grid->register_f4_for_fields( VALUE #( ( fieldname = 'ID' register = abap_true ) )  ).
    SET HANDLER on_data_changed FOR grid.
    SET HANDLER on_f4 FOR grid.

    cl_gui_container=>set_focus( grid ).

  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD get_fcat.

    result = VALUE #(
      ( fieldname  = 'ID'
        inttype    = 'C'
        rollname   = 'CHAR10'
        edit       = abap_true
        f4availabl = abap_true
        datatype   = 'CHAR'
        reptext    = 'DEMO' ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD on_data_changed.
    LOOP AT er_data_changed->mt_good_cells ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<cell>).
      CASE <cell>-fieldname.
        WHEN 'ID'.
          IF <cell>-value = 'WRONG'.
            er_data_changed->add_protocol_entry(
                i_msgid     = 'OO'
                i_msgty     = 'E'
                i_msgno     = '000'
                i_msgv1     = 'Input is wrong!'
                i_fieldname = <cell>-fieldname
                i_row_id    = <cell>-row_id
                i_tabix     = <cell>-tabix ).
            IF e_onf4 = 'A'.
              MESSAGE 'Input is wrong!' TYPE 'I'.
            ENDIF.
          ENDIF.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD on_f4.

    DATA answer TYPE c LENGTH 1.

    CALL FUNCTION 'POPUP_TO_DECIDE'
      EXPORTING
        defaultoption     = '1'          " Cursor position on first or second alternative
        textline1         = 'Please choose'
        text_option1      = 'OKAY'
        text_option2      = 'WRONG'
        icon_text_option1 = 'OKAY'
        icon_text_option2 = 'WRONG'
        titel             = 'Demo'
        start_column      = 25           " Start column of the dialog box
        start_row         = 6            " Start line of the dialog box
        cancel_display    = 'X'
      IMPORTING
        answer            = answer.
    IF answer = 'A'.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS <mod_values> TYPE lvc_t_modi.
    ASSIGN er_event_data->m_data->* TO <mod_values>.
    <mod_values> = VALUE lvc_t_modi(
         ( row_id    = es_row_no-row_id
           fieldname = e_fieldname
           value     = SWITCH #( answer WHEN '1' THEN 'OKAY' ELSE 'WRONG' ) ) ).

    er_event_data->m_event_handled = abap_true.

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

INITIALIZATION.
  DATA(docker) = NEW cl_gui_docking_container( side = cl_gui_docking_container=>dock_at_bottom ratio = 90 ).
  NEW appl( )->start( docker ).

Testing

Variant a) Enter "wrong" manually -> protocol entry appears

Variant b) choose value WRONG by F4 -> protocol will not be shown

Hints

on_data_changed-onf4 has value "A" after onf4-event. so I can react on this issue.

er_data_changed->protocol_is_visible() returns "0" in both cases.

But in my opinion this is an error in cl_gui_alv_grid. I do not see any reason why in this case the protocol should be hidden...

entry.title: Not able to find /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE package
entry.content: I'm currently going through the Acquiring Core ABAP Skills course. As part of the exercises, I'm required to use the package /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE. However, I'm unable to find this package in the system, despite following all the steps correctly. Could you please guide me on how to access or add this package?

entry.title: How to Reterive back standard DPC_Ext class after deleting accidently.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Using the report: SEO_DETECT_GARBAGE I accidently delete the Class:  CL_MM_PRC_SEV_CONFIG_DPC_EXT. How to retrieve Back the dpc_ext class. This is related to Supplier Evaluation Weighting and Scoring (app id: F2551)

Project Name: MM_PRC_SEV_CONFIG

please Help me on this.

thanks

entry.title: Error Deploying BSP App to S4 Hana Backend error message: No default virus profile active or found.
entry.content: Hi Community, I am trying to deploy BSP app to S4 HANA system via Business Application Studio, After entering Credentials I am getting the below error. how to resolve and deploy without any error.

entry.title: Confirm Popup with Standard Text (SO10)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement in ABAP where I need to display a popup window that shows:

  1. A standard text (SO10) that contains more than 300 characters

  2. Additional text (around 10 lines) coming from an internal table

  3. The popup should display both — the standard text followed by the table text

  4. The user should be able to choose Yes or Cancel 

I initially tried using function modules like DISPLAY_TEXT and POPUP_TO_CONFIRM, but:

  • DISPLAY_TEXT supports long text but doesn't allow user interaction

  • POPUP_TO_CONFIRM allows Yes/No but only for short text

 Is there any standard function module to achieve this functionality?

Thanks
Dhaksinamoorthi.
